pages.title: Snow Drift
pages.description:
Drift through slippery snowy tracks controlling a lightweight sports car designed for precision slide maneuvers. Players master timing and angle adjustments to maintain high-speed drifts while navigating icy curves and avoiding snowy obstacles. The game challenges players to perfect their drifting skills on progressively tricky winter circuits.

• Responsive car sliding mechanics  
• Increasingly complex track layouts  
• Time trial scoring system  
• Frosty winter race environment
